text:
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP occurrence file 
LT occurrence file 
OT occurrence file 
VALUES: 
Date (numeric, system dependent) 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 
COMMENT: 
Occurrence codes are associated with specific date(s); refer to the occurrence code start 
(OCRNC_CD_START_DT) and end dates (OCRNC_CD_END_DT).
